steps.note: Photos used as the camera interruption analog (no sim camera feed)
cosmetic status-bar override only; UIDevice battery/low-power not drivable on simulator
no agent on :31337 within 30s (build may be cloud/onboarding mode): TypeError: fetch failed
no simctl verb for lock/sleep; Simulator.app Device > Lock is manual-only
simulator exposes no ringer/mute switch control
real battery + Low Power Mode require a physical device
simctl shutdown+boot restarts simulated hardware but iOS has no BOOT_COMPLETED-style third-party autostart to assert; relaunch-after-terminate above is the recovery proof
